title: He spent $7k of his own money to make GLM-5.2 better - 0xSero
summary: An individual reportedly spent $7,000 of personal funds to improve GLM-5.2 model performance. The video discusses local AI models, GLM 5.2, and related open-source improvements, presented as a case study in grassroots AI development.
writeup: David Ondrej hosts 0xSero, who spent $7,000 of personal funds working to improve the performance of the GLM-5.2 model. The conversation covers local AI tools, including GLM-5.2 and Fable 5, and touches on model compression as a method for running models locally. The takeaway is a firsthand account of self-funded model optimization and the local AI tooling involved.
